hero.title:
MR GRAND
MEN'S STAY
hero.synopsis: Experience premium living in the heart of Hyderabad with premium facilities, quality food and a vibrant community.
rotatingSubtitles: Experience premium living in the heart of Hyderabad with premium facilities, quality food and a vibrant community.
हैदराबाद के दिल में प्रीमियम सुविधाओं, गुणवत्तापूर्ण भोजन और एक जीवंत समुदाय के साथ प्रीमियम जीवन का अनुभव करें।
అత్యుత్తమ సౌకర్యాలు, నాణ్యమైన ఆహారం మరియు స్నేహపూర్వక సమాజంతో హైదరాబాద్ హృదయంలో ప్రీమియం జీవనాన్ని అనుభవించండి.

about.title: Who We Are
about.description1: Welcome to MR Grand Men's Stay PG, a premium living space in the heart of Hyderabad. Located at Prashanth Hills, Raidurgam, we are just a walkable distance from major IT firms.
about.description2: Our motto is "Finding Family in Hostel". We believe that a PG should be more than just a room; it should be a place where you feel at home, safe, and part of a community.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.acElectricitySection: AC rooms are priced as shown above; electricity charges are added on top of the base rent.
pricing.acElectricityNote: AC room electricity is billed separately based on usage.

reviews.title: What Our Family Says
items: I am staying in this PG from past 1 year. The area is peaceful and friendly environment. The owners are like a family...
I had an amazing experience at this hostel. The staff were incredibly friendly and always ready to help...
This PG owners are also providing catering services... Their food is very tasty and price is also reasonable.
Food is nice and they are providing 24/7 electricity. The main thing is that they are not using palm oil in vegetables.
Nice place to stay, good ventilation and proper maintenance. Food is really good. Management is very good...
This PG is very good and hygienic food provided at affordable price...
Nice PG and good food. They clean the rooms on daily basis without fail and very hygienic.
Hygienic tasty food, best for employees, friendly management.
Good place & food. Owners are very friendly. I recommend this PG to IT professionals since this is very near to all IT companies.
Good PG to stay. PG owner Mr Srinu Chowdhury is a good and responsible person. Listens to complaints and gets them fixed.
Good room, services are good. The most important thing is food.
The MR Grand PG hostel is an excellent place to stay. Offering delicious food and a comfortable environment...

location.badge: Located in Hyderabad's Prime IT Corridor
location.title: Minutes Away From Everything That Matters
location.subtitle: Live closer to work, reduce commute stress, and enjoy the best of Hyderabad's tech corridor.
location.commuteTitle: Trade traffic for time that is actually yours.
location.commuteCopy: Stay near Mindspace, HITEC City, Financial District, and Raidurg Metro so weekday commutes feel shorter and evenings start sooner.
location.note: *Distances and travel times are approximate and may vary depending on traffic conditions.*
